summary: 当前评分基于 AI 输出与 golden 的结构化对比。

segmentScores.source: VALUE DRIVER: "Drop-in" side pockets
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 核心卖点：侧插袋设计

segmentScores.source: Wrinkle free fabric
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 抗皱面料

segmentScores.source: Glued bottom hem
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 贴合下摆工艺

segmentScores.source: Quality spec: Lightweight fabric, quick dry and moisture wicking. 4-way stretch and wrinkle free. Should be able to have glued edges. Plain jersey / no structure with a good "body" not flimsy, but more spongy. More or less the fabric below, please advice if you believe it is a good fit.
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 面料要求：轻薄面料，具备快干排湿功能；四面弹力且抗皱；需支持无缝胶合工艺；采用平纹针织结构，面料需有骨感、不软塌，并带有偏海绵感的柔软手感。请根据下方参考面料评估是否合适。
segmentScores.matchedSource: Quality spec: Lightweight fabric, quick dry and moisture wicking. 4-way stretch and wrinkle free. Should be able to have glued edges. Plain jersey / no structure with a good "body" not flimsy, but more spongy. More or less the fabric below, please advice of you believe it is a good fit
segmentScores.matchedTranslation: 质量规格：轻薄面料，速干吸湿。四面弹且抗皱。边缘应可粘合。平纹汗布/无结构但具有良好的“挺括感”，不软塌，更有弹性。大致如下方面料，如您认为合适请告知 [待确认]

segmentScores.source: Lightweight skirt with double pockets at side
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 轻薄半裙，侧边双口袋设计
segmentScores.matchedSource: Lightweight skirt with double pockets at side

segmentScores.source: Pocket at CB in waist seam
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 后中腰缝位置增加口袋
segmentScores.matchedSource: Pocket at CB in waist seam

segmentScores.source: Filled piping detail at front and back
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 前后片增加夹牙滚边细节
segmentScores.matchedSource: Filled piping detail at front and back

segmentScores.source: Glued hem at bottom
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 下摆采用贴合工艺

segmentScores.source: Folded waist with elastic at waist
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 折叠式松紧腰头
segmentScores.matchedSource: Folded waist with elastic at waist

segmentScores.source: Inner shorts attached to skirt
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 裙身内置短裤衬里

segmentScores.source: Rubber logo front and back
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 前后位置均有硅胶 Logo

segmentScores.source: Rubber logo glued to fabric, 53x13 mm wide, upraised print. Centered, 2 cm from waist. Artwork sent separately.
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 硅胶 Logo，尺寸 53x13mm，立体压印效果；居中放置，距腰线 2cm；图稿另发。
segmentScores.matchedSource: Rubber logo glued to fabric, 53x13 mm wide, upraised print Centered, 2 cm from waist Artwork sent seperately
segmentScores.matchedTranslation: 橡胶标胶贴于面料，宽 53x13mm，凸起印刷。居中，距腰头 2cm。设计稿另发。

segmentScores.source: Open pocket at CB, 12 cm wide, see sep image for reference
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 后中开口袋，宽 12cm，具体结构参照单独图片。
segmentScores.matchedSource: Open pocket at CB, 12 cm wide, see sep image for reference
segmentScores.matchedTranslation: 后中（CB）开袋，宽 12cm，参考单独图片。

segmentScores.source: Filled piping in contrast colour
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 撞色夹牙滚边。

segmentScores.source: Double layer shell pocket, folded and glued top
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 双层面料口袋，口袋顶端折叠并做贴合处理。
segmentScores.matchedSource: Double layer shell pocket, folded and glued top
segmentScores.matchedTranslation: 双层主袋，顶部折叠并胶贴。

segmentScores.source: New inner shorts, see next page for details
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 新增内置短裤，详见下一页。
segmentScores.matchedSource: New inner shorts, see next page for details
segmentScores.matchedTranslation: 新款内衬短裤，详情见下一页。

segmentScores.source: Rubber logo glued to fabric, 18x15 mm wide, upraised print. 3 cm from hem, 1.5 cm from piping.
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 另一处硅胶 Logo，尺寸 18x15mm，距下摆 3cm，距夹牙滚边 1.5cm。
segmentScores.matchedSource: Rubber logo glued to fabric, front and back 18x15 mm wide, upraised print 3 cm from hem, 1,5 cm from slit Artwork sent seperately
segmentScores.matchedTranslation: 橡胶 Logo 胶贴在面料上，前后各一，宽 18x15 mm，凸起印刷，距下摆 3 cm，距开衩 1.5 cm。设计稿另行发送。

segmentScores.source: Glued hem, slight shaped front and back
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 贴合下摆，前后幅做轻微造型。

segmentScores.source: Logo rubber print inside leg as grip function to prevent shorts from moving upwards
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 裤腿内侧增加硅胶 Logo 防滑带，用于防止短裤上移。
segmentScores.matchedSource: Logo rubber print inside leg as grip function appearance to prevent shorts from moving upwards
segmentScores.matchedTranslation: 裤腿内侧胶印 Logo 作为防滑功能，防止短裤上移

segmentScores.source: Slanting side pocket, glued hem for flat appearance
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 侧边斜插袋，口袋边缘采用贴合工艺，保证外观平整。
segmentScores.matchedSource: Slanting side pocket, glued hem for flat appearance
segmentScores.matchedTranslation: 斜插侧袋，粘合下摆以确保平整外观

segmentScores.source: New inner shorts for least visible appearance
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 新版内置短裤，目标是尽量降低外观显露感。
segmentScores.matchedSource: New inner shorts for least visible appearence:
segmentScores.matchedTranslation: 新款内衬短裤，追求最小可见度外观：

segmentScores.source: No CF seam
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 去除前中缝。
segmentScores.matchedTranslation: ⚠️ [注意否定/责任] 无前中缝

segmentScores.source: Glued hems or similar flat and clean making
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 裤腿边缘采用无缝贴合或类似的平整工艺。
segmentScores.matchedSource: Glued hems or similar flat and clean making
segmentScores.matchedTranslation: 粘合下摆或类似平整干净的做工

segmentScores.source: Slanting pocket at right-hand side
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 右侧设斜插袋。

segmentScores.source: Please send 2 samples, one with slit (opt 2) and one with piping (opt 1)
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 请提供两件样品：一件做开衩（方案二），一件做夹牙滚边（方案一）。
segmentScores.matchedSource: Please send 2 samples, one with slit (opt 2) and one with piping (opt 1)
segmentScores.matchedTranslation: 请寄送 2 件样衣，一件带开衩（选项 2），一件带滚边（选项 1）。[待确认]

segmentScores.source: Rubber logo glued to fabric, 53x13 mm wide, upraised print. Centered, 2 cm from waist.
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 后腰下方居中位置放置 53x13mm 硅胶 Logo，距腰顶 2cm。
segmentScores.matchedSource: Rubber logo glued to fabric, 53x13 mm wide, upraised print Centered, 2 cm from waist Artwork sent seperately
segmentScores.matchedTranslation: 橡胶标胶贴于面料，宽 53x13mm，凸起印刷。居中，距腰头 2cm。设计稿另发。

segmentScores.source: Seam stitched and turned
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 缝线结构改为车缝后翻处理。

segmentScores.source: Double layer shell pocket, folded and glued top
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 双层面料口袋，口袋顶端做贴合工艺。
segmentScores.matchedSource: Double layer shell pocket, folded and glued top
segmentScores.matchedTranslation: 双层主袋，顶部折叠并胶贴。

segmentScores.source: Slit at seam, 8 cm high
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 侧缝位置开衩，高度 8cm。

segmentScores.source: Glued hem, slight shaped front and back
segmentScores.expectedTranslation: 下摆贴合处理，前后幅略微塑形。
